GenerateArtifactDto.cs.Description: This dto was designed to be immutable once received to avoid any unintentional changes in the data that could cause downstream side effects. It also has built in validation to ensure all required data is provided.

NoteDtos.Text: The "Required" attribute ensures a value is provided at the controller level and automatically returns a 400 error if a value is missing.
Dto properties are init-only so user input can't be modified unintentionally.
This assignment to default just provides a way to apply the null-forgiving operator to remove nullability warnings since a value is required to create the object.
